title: The Creative Act
author: Rick Rubin
subline: A way of being, not a way of doing.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A vertical column of dots rising up (the energy of creation). At the top, one dot is RED. At the bottom, a single drop. The column is 78 ash dots; the 79th is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- 79 ash dots stacked vertically, each 18px apart, from y=-800 to y=600 -->
    <g fill="#cccccc">
      <circle cx="0" cy="-800" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-780" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-760" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-740" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-720" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-700" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-680" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-660" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-640" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-620" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-600" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-580" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-560" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-540" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-520" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-500" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-480" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-460" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-440" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-420" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-400" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-380" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-360" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-340" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-320" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-300" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-280" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-260" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-240" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-220" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-200" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-180" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-160" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-140" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-120" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-100" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-80" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-60" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-40" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="-20" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="20" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="40" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="60" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="80" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="100" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="120" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="140" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="160" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="180" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="200" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="220" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="240" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="260" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="280" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="300" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="320" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="340" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="360" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="380" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="400" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="420" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="440" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="460" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="480" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="500" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="520" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="540" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="560" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="580" r="4"/><circle cx="0" cy="600" r="4"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The single red dot near the top — the breakthrough moment -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-840" r="10" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- A small label: 79 chapters -->
    <text x="0" y="-880" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">79 · THE THRESHOLD</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A vertical column of 78 ash dots (the practice), with the 79th dot at the top RED — the threshold moment. Rubin's book has 79 short chapters. 280px whisper title at the bottom.
